2026-04-08T17:39:31.9376395Z state without impacting any branches by switching back to a branch.

2026-04-08T17:39:31.9377989Z do so (now or later) by using -c with the switch command. Example:
2026-04-08T17:39:31.9378432Z 
2026-04-08T17:39:31.9378629Z   git switch -c <new-branch-name>
2026-04-08T17:39:31.9378929Z
